campaigns.core.title: Core Islamic Campaigns
campaigns.core.description: Fulfilling specific community obligations and spreading joy during holy months in Tanzania.
campaign.ramadan.title: Ramadan Relief
campaign.ramadan.desc: Providing Suhoor and Iftar food packages to impoverished families throughout the holy month of Ramadan.
campaign.zakat.title: Zakat Distribution
campaign.zakat.desc: Purify your wealth. We ensure your Zakat reaches the most eligible families strictly under Islamic guidelines.
campaign.eid.title: Eid Clothing
campaign.eid.desc: Gift a child the joy of Eid with brand new clothes. Ensure they feel valued and celebrated.
masjid.title: Masjid Construction
masjid.lead: Building a Masjid is an ongoing charity (Sadaqah Jariyah). Our construction projects provide structurally sound mosques that serve as the heart of rural communities.
masjid.benefit.2: Serving as educational hubs for children.
impact.map.title: Where We Make Impact
impact.map.subtitle: Every marker is a real project in Tanzania — powered by your generosity.
katarakt.title: Restoring Sight: Cataract Relief
katarakt.lead: Thousands in Tanzania suffer from preventable blindness due to cataracts. For many elderly individuals, this means a loss of independence and severe hardship. Our medical camps provide free, life-changing cataract surgeries that restore sight in under 30 minutes.
katarakt.impact.desc: Funds an entire surgery, including pre-operative screening, the procedure itself, and post-operative medications.

about.hero.title: About Mina Foundation
about.hero.description: Our mission is to empower the community through education, support services, and sustainable programs.
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.text1: Mina Foundation was established in 2021 with a vision to create a supportive ecosystem for families. What started as a small community initiative has grown into a comprehensive foundation serving over 20,000+ of families across the region.
about.story.text2: Our founders recognized the unique challenges faced by the community and sought to build a platform that addresses these challenges while preserving cultural values and traditions.
about.story.text3: Today, Mina Foundation stands as a beacon of hope and support, continuously evolving to meet the changing needs of our community while staying true to our core values of compassion, integrity, and excellence.
about.values.title: Our Core Values
about.values.desc: These principles guide everything we do and every decision we make as an organization.
about.values.integrityDesc: We uphold the highest ethical standards and transparency in all our operations.
about.values.compassionDesc: We approach our work with empathy and genuine care for those we serve.
about.values.excellenceDesc: We strive for quality and continuous improvement in all our programs and services.
about.team.title: Our Team
about.team.desc: Meet the dedicated individuals who work tirelessly to fulfill our mission.
about.cta.title: Join Our Community
about.cta.desc: Be part of our mission to strengthen families and build resilient communities.
contact.hero.title: Contact Us
contact.hero.desc: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out with questions, feedback, or to learn more about our work.
contact.getInTouch.title: Get in Touch
contact.officeHours.time: Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Friday: 8:00 AM - Saturday: Closed, Sunday: Closed
contact.sendMessage.title: Send a Message
contact.form.name: Your Name
contact.form.subject: Subject
contact.form.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
gallery.description: Captured moments from our desert projects and scenic routes across the nation.
impact.page.title: Real Impact, Real Locations.
impact.page.description: Transparency is at the heart of our mission. Explore the interactive map below to see exactly where your contributions are making a difference across every corner of Tanzania.
impact.page.markerStory: Each marker on this map represents more than just a GPS coordinate. It's a story of a community that now has clean water, a group of orphans who have a safe place to sleep, or a family that has regained their livelihood through sustainable poultry farming.
impact.page.locationDesc: We work closely with local community leaders and government officials to identify regions with the highest need and lowest accessibility to basic services.
impact.page.expandDesc: There are still many areas in Tanzania that require immediate attention. Your feedback and support help us plan the next "Pulse" on our map.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.section1.p1: Mina Foundation (we, our, or us) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our Site, make a donation, or otherwise interact with our services.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Information We Collect
privacy.section2.p1: We collect information in several ways:
privacy.section2.li.donation: When you make a donation, we collect your name, email, phone, billing address, and payment details (we do not store full card numbers).
privacy.section2.li.account: If you create an account, we collect your name, email, phone, and a hashed password.
privacy.section2.li.usage: Non-personal information such as IP address, browser, and pages visited collected via cookies and logs.
privacy.section2.li.communications: Information you provide when contacting us, such as name, email, and message content.
privacy.section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
privacy.section3.p1: We use collected information to provide and improve our services and communicate with you.
privacy.section3.li.sendUpdates: Send updates about programs and campaigns
privacy.section3.li.respondInquiries: Respond to inquiries and support requests
privacy.section4.title: 4. Information Sharing
privacy.section4.p1: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with payment processors and service providers as needed.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Data Retention
privacy.section5.p1: We retain personal information as long as needed to provide services and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.section6.title: 6. Data Security
privacy.section6.p1: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data, but no system is completely secure.
privacy.section7.title: 7. Cookies & Tracking
privacy.section7.p1: We use cookies for essential functionality, analytics, and marketing (with your consent).
privacy.section8.title: 8. Your Rights
privacy.section8.p1: Depending on your location you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data.
privacy.section9.title: 9. Third-Party Links
privacy.section9.p1: Our site may include links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
privacy.section10.title: 10. Children's Privacy
privacy.section10.p1: Our website is not directed to children under 13 and we do not knowingly collect their personal information.
privacy.section11.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
privacy.section11.p1: We may update this policy and will post the updated version on this page.
privacy.section12.title: 12. Contact Us
privacy.section12.p1: If you have questions about this policy contact us at info@minafoundation.org.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.section1.p1: By accessing or using the Mina Foundation website you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Site.
terms.section2.title: 2. About Mina Foundation
terms.section2.p1: Mina Foundation is a registered non-profit organization based in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania.
terms.section3.title: 3. Charitable Donations
terms.section3.p1: By making a donation you agree to our donation terms:
terms.section3.li.1: Donations are voluntary and generally non-refundable.
terms.section3.li.2: Donations are used to support our programs and operations.
terms.section3.li.3: Payments are processed by third-party processors and subject to their terms.
terms.section3.li.4: You must be authorized to use the payment method.
terms.section4.title: 4. User Accounts
terms.section4.p1: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity under your account.
terms.section5.title: 5. Prohibited Uses
terms.section5.p1: You agree not to use the Site for unlawful or harmful activities, including malware, fraud, or harassment.
terms.section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
terms.section6.p1: All content on the Site is owned by Mina Foundation or its licensors and protected by law.
terms.section7.title: 7. Third-Party Services
terms.section7.p1: The Site may include links to third-party services; interactions with them are between you and the third party.
terms.section8.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.section8.p1: The Site is provided as-is without warranties; we do not guarantee it will be uninterrupted or error-free.
terms.section9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
terms.section9.p1: To the extent permitted by law, Mina Foundation is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.section10.title: 10. Indemnification
terms.section10.p1: You agree to indemnify Mina Foundation against claims arising from your use of the Site.
terms.section11.title: 11. Governing Law
terms.section11.p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the United Republic of Tanzania.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.section1.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
cookies.section1.p1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help sites function and improve the user experience.
cookies.section2.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
cookies.section2.p1: We use cookies to improve site functionality, analyze usage, and support marketing efforts.
cookies.section3.title: 3. Categories of Cookies We Use
cookies.categories.essential.title: Essential Cookies
cookies.categories.essential.desc: Necessary for site functionality, sessions, and security.
cookies.categories.essential.examples: Session cookies, authentication tokens, shopping cart cookies
cookies.categories.performance.title: Performance Cookies
cookies.categories.performance.desc: Collect anonymous data about site usage to help improve performance.
cookies.categories.performance.examples: Google Analytics page view tracking, session duration
cookies.categories.functionality.title: Functionality Cookies
cookies.categories.functionality.desc: Remember your preferences like language and donation choices.
cookies.categories.functionality.example: Remembering your preferred donation amount, language settings
cookies.categories.marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
cookies.categories.marketing.desc: Used with consent to deliver relevant ads and measure campaign effectiveness.
cookies.categories.marketing.examples: Facebook Pixel, Google Ads conversion tracking
cookies.section4.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
cookies.section4.p1: Some cookies are set by third-party services such as analytics and payment providers.
cookies.section5.title: 5. Managing Your Cookie Preferences
cookies.section5.p1: You can manage cookies via our consent banner or your browser settings.
cookies.section5.li.browser: Browser settings let you block or delete cookies.
cookies.section5.li.chrome: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies
cookies.section5.li.edge: Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions
cookies.section5.note: Note: Disabling essential cookies may impair site functionality.
cookies.section6.title: 6. Do Not Track
cookies.section6.p1: We currently do not respond to Do Not Track signals; we honour choices made via our cookie consent mechanism.
cookies.section7.title: 7. Contact
cookies.section7.p1: If you have questions about cookies contact us at info@minafoundation.org.
